global.description: The ad features a dark background with a prominent logo and call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting a streaming service with a sale announcement.

elements.label: Dark background
elements.description: A dark, solid background that provides contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: A simple, modern logo featuring the text 'BingeLayer' in a bold font.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Abstract geometric shapes, including circles and rectangles, in muted colors.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A prominent headline that reads 'SALE' in a bold, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Streaming message
elements.description: Text that says 'Stream the hype' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Weekly hits message
elements.description: Smaller text below the main message that reads 'New hits every week'.

elements.label: Play button
elements.description: A small play button icon, typically triangular, indicating video content.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bold button that says 'Start now', designed to attract user interaction.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype New hits every week

elements.label: BingeLayer title
elements.description: The title 'BingeLayer' displayed prominently at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Start now button
elements.description: A bright button at the bottom of the ad encouraging users to take action.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge that indicates a sale, typically in a bright color to attract attention.
